aspect to any radical or progressed planet. Now on the 17th
February I find the Moon in Capricorn; and there is an exact
square aspect at 11-8 a.m. with radical Mars (3 de g. 26' Libra).
And since the presumed time of birth falls near about II -10
a.m., the result of this aspect ought to take place near about
the birthday.
If there is an appropriate aspect on the progressed day,
find the actual time when this is formed and convert it into
months and days. Since one day is taken to stand for one year,
two hours will stand for a month. Here, we are asked to note
